Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(c\)\); console.log\(''''api name:'''', p.name, ''''version:'''', p.version\);}\)")
